title: Prefer small focused commits
content: Smaller commits are easier to review, easier to revert, and reduce merge conflict risk when multiple contributors work in parallel.

title: Use virtual environments by default
content: Project-specific virtual environments prevent dependency leaks across projects and make builds more reproducible on CI.

title: Write one behavior per test
content: Single-purpose tests fail with clearer intent and reduce time spent diagnosing what actually regressed.

title: Rotate credentials on schedule
content: Regular credential rotation limits blast radius if a secret leaks and encourages teams to maintain key management hygiene.

title: Add indexes for real query patterns
content: Measure slow queries first, then index based on predicates and sort order. Over-indexing harms write performance.

title: Design for idempotency
content: Idempotent create/update endpoints make retries safe under network failures and reduce accidental duplicate operations.

title: Log with stable keys
content: Structured logs with predictable field names make filtering and alerting far easier than free-form log lines.

title: Keep boundaries explicit
content: Defining module boundaries early reduces accidental coupling and keeps refactors local instead of system-wide.

title: Optimize first contentful view
content: Prioritizing critical rendering path assets improves perceived performance more than micro-optimizing non-critical code paths.

title: Set realistic timeouts everywhere
content: Explicit timeouts on outbound calls prevent thread exhaustion and keep cascading failures contained.

title: Automate rollback paths
content: A tested rollback mechanism shortens incident duration and increases confidence during high-frequency deployments.

title: Name intent, not mechanics
content: Readable names should communicate business intent so maintainers understand why code exists before how it works.

title: Use exponential backoff with jitter
content: Backoff plus jitter avoids retry storms and improves recovery behavior when downstream systems are degraded.

title: Keep runbooks close to code
content: Version-controlled operational runbooks age better than external docs and stay aligned with implementation changes.

title: Batch similar tasks
content: Grouping related cognitive tasks reduces context switching overhead and improves steady development throughput.

title: Retry only safe operations
content: Not all requests should be retried blindly; non-idempotent calls need safeguards or idempotency keys.

title: Fail fast on lint and tests
content: Early pipeline checks give faster feedback loops and reduce wasted compute in late deployment stages.

title: Measure before tuning
content: Profiling first prevents optimization of cold paths and helps teams target changes with measurable user impact.

title: Keyboard support is a baseline
content: All interactive controls should be reachable and usable by keyboard to support accessibility and power users.

title: Write decisions down
content: Lightweight decision records preserve context, reduce repeated debates, and accelerate onboarding for new contributors.
